recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.82 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: 2 packages with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @world-forge/editor, @ai-rpg-engine/terminal-ui. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.
